div.p: Cross-Attention Semantics: Each decoder position queries the encoder:

ul.li: Decoder generates query based on target prefix
Encoder provides keys/values from source understanding
Attention weights = relevance of each source position
Output = weighted blend of encoder representations Critical: Same encoder output used by ALL decoder layers

g.text: Query (Q): Decoder hidden states - 'what am I looking for?'
Key (K): Encoder representations - 'what content is available?'
Value (V): Encoder representations - 'what content to retrieve?'
Encoder output passed to EVERY decoder layer (not just last)
